creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello Makoto,

unfortunately, there hasn't been any activity with your problem report for
cad/spice (see [1]) for quite a while. Are you still seeing the problem
you described on an up-to-date system, or should the PR be closed?

The port does not have a maintainer, and I am not familiar with cad/spice
at all. I'm cc'ing Pedro Giffuni, who submitted the last functional
changes to the port, just in case he might be able to help.

Best regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/157313
